text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna pray really hard so I can get
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Where are those notes I made earlier? Aha, there.
I have to communicate what I want in as much
detail as possible.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh.... I can't read my handwriting!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Oh, right. I need to get my prayers all sorted out...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... I wanna be... strong enough... to pull a...
tire...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um... "I wanna be... strange... enough to... poll a
tiger"? Argh, I can't read this at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser ends up unable to convey
her wishes to the powers above.
